import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { GraduationCap, Upload, Plus, Edit, Trash2, Users, Star, DollarSign, BookOpen, TrendingUp, BarChart3, PieChart, X } from 'lucide-react'; const InstructorPage = ({ courses, onAddCourse, onDeleteCourse }) => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('dashboard'); const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false); const [courseForm, setCourseForm] = useState({ title: '', desc: '', price: '', cat: 'development', level: 'Beginner', time: '', instructor: 'Current User', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=400&h=200&fit=crop' }); const instructorStats = { totalCourses: courses.length, totalStudents: courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + course.enrolled, 0), totalRevenue: courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + (course.price * course.enrolled), 0), avgRating: courses.length > 0 ? (courses.reduce((sum, course) => sum + parseFloat(course.rating), 0) / courses.length).toFixed(1) : '0.0' }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (courseForm.title && courseForm.desc && courseForm.price) { onAddCourse({ ...courseForm, price: parseInt(courseForm.price) }); setCourseForm({ title: '', desc: '', price: '', cat: 'development', level: 'Beginner', time: '', instructor: 'Current User', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?w=400&h=200&fit=crop' }); setShowUploadModal(false); alert('Course uploaded successfully!'); } }; const handleDelete = (courseId, courseTitle) => { if (window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete "${courseTitle}"?`)) { onDeleteCourse(courseId); alert('Course deleted successfully!'); } }; const RevenueChart = () => { const data = [20, 35, 45, 30, 55, 40, 65]; const maxValue = Math.max(...data); return (
{data.map((value, index) => (
{index + 1}
))}
); }; const EnrollmentChart = () => { const data = [15, 25, 35, 20, 45, 30, 50]; const maxValue = Math.max(...data); return (
{data.map((value, index) => (
W{index + 1}
))}
); }; const PerformanceChart = () => { const categories = [ { name: 'Development', percentage: 70, color: 'blue' }, { name: 'Design', percentage: 45, color: 'green' }, { name: 'Business', percentage: 60, color: 'yellow' }, { name: 'AI/Data Science', percentage: 35, color: 'purple' } ]; return (
{categories.map((category, index) => (
{category.name}
{category.percentage}%
))}
); }; return (

{activeTab === 'courses' && (
